title: Default status label no longer appears in pie charts
excerpt:
Hello, 
I just noticed that default status labels no longer appear in our status pie charts.  Am I missing something, or is this a correct assessment of a new “feature”? 
Thanks!

posts.author: T_K (T K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I just noticed that default status labels no longer appear in our status pie charts. Am I missing something, or is this a correct assessment of a new “feature”?
Thanks!

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You need to go into your chart setting and select show empty values.

See screenshot below

image1834×849 51.2 KB

Hope this helps
